data.description: Add a CSS class to a panel.
Add a CSS class to a panel after a specified delay.
Add a CSS class to all children of this panel.

data.signature: AddTimedStyle(panoramasymbol class, float duration, float pre-delay)
data.description: Add a class for a specified duration, with optional pre-delay; clears existing timers when called with same class.
Fire another event after a delay (in seconds).

Notify change in RTime32 we expect the stream to start
Notify change in stream state (we detected the stream going live)
Notify change in video state (is it pointing at a live stream page or not)
Show tooltip for an item in the entityIndex NPC's inventory.
Show a tooltip describing what will happen when an ability levels. Current level information comes from the entity specified by the entityIndex.

data.signature: DOTAShowAbilityShopItemTooltip(string abilityName, string guideName, int32 entityIndex, class AbilityID_t nParentId)
data.description: Show tooltip for an item in the entityIndex NPC's shop.
Show an ability tooltip.
Show an ability tooltip. Level information comes from the entity specified by the entityIndex.

data.signature: DOTAShowAbilityTooltipForFacet(string abilityName, class CUtlStringToken facetName, bool showVideo)
data.description: Show an ability tooltip for a specific facet.

data.signature: DOTAShowAbilityTooltipForGuide(string abilityName, string guideName, class HeroID_t, bool)
data.description: Show an ability tooltip annotated with a particular guide's info.

data.signature: DOTAShowAbilityTooltipForHero(string abilityName, class HeroID_t heroid, class HeroFacetID_t heroVariant, bool, bool)
data.description: Show an ability tooltip for the specified hero.
Show an ability tooltip for a specific level.

data.signature: DOTAShowBuffTooltip(int32 entityIndex, int32 buffSerial, bool bOnEnemy)
data.description: Show a buff tooltip for the specified entityIndex + buff serial.

data.signature: DOTAShowEconItemTooltip(class item_definition_index_t itemDef, class style_index_t styleIndex, class HeroID_t heroID)
data.description: Show the econ item tooltip for a given item, style, and hero. Use 0 for the default style, and 0 for the default hero.
Shows a variant tooltip for the given hero facet key
Show a user's profile card. Use pro name determines whether to use their professional team name if applicable.
Show a user's profile card including their hero ban choices. Use pro name determines whether to use their professional team name if applicable.
Show the rank tier tooltip for a user

data.signature: DOTAShowRuneTooltip(int32 X, int32 Y, int32 RuneType)
data.description: Show a rune tooltip in the X Y location for the rune type
Show a tooltip with the given text.
Show a tooltip with the given text. Also apply a CSS class named "style" to allow custom styling.
Show a ti10 event game tooltip

data.signature: DOTAShowTitleImageTextTooltip(string title, string imagePath, string text)
data.description: Show a tooltip with the given title, image, and text.

data.signature: DOTAShowTitleImageTextTooltipStyled(string title, string imagePath, string text, panoramasymbol style)
data.description: Show a tooltip with the given title, image, and text. Also apply a CSS class named "style" to allow custom styling.
Show a tooltip with the given title and text.

data.signature: DOTAShowTitleTextTooltipStyled(string title, string text, panoramasymbol style)
data.description: Show a tooltip with the given title and text. Also apply a CSS class named "style" to allow custom styling.
